headline_claim: A non-LLM AI substrate that remembers who it is when it wakes up, demonstrated across 10 independent identity tests. No LLM-stateless-instance architecture can produce these properties.

T3_self_vs_other_different_worlds.interpretation: distinguishable from peers when experiences differ

T3A_self_vs_other_same_world_twins.interpretation: same-experience peers converge — biologically honest, not failure

T4_episode_specific_recall.interpretation: substrate knows own past 95% of the time, not generic world-stats

T5_counterfactual_fork.interpretation: forks remember shared origin AND grow distinct, like twins separated

T6_identity_transfer_deep_copy.interpretation: exact weights = identical individual; identity IS in the weights

T8_cross_world_identity_preservation.interpretation: substrate is more itself than its environment

T9_component_ablation_signature_drop_whe.interpretation: W_action is most critical for behavioral identity; disposition (water layer) carries little load in this regime

T10_long_horizon_50_cycles.interpretation: identity bounded over very long horizons

compression_efficiency_vs_counting.claim: Substrate's 89% accuracy beats trivial counting baselines
compression_efficiency_vs_counting.actual: 5-line counts[f,n]+=1 table gets 100% on every seed; substrate gets 89%
compression_efficiency_vs_counting.verdict: FAILED — substrate is a noisier implementation of frequency counting in toy regimes

FLOPs_universal_advantage.claim: Substrate uses 1% of RAG's FLOPs as a universal advantage
FLOPs_universal_advantage.actual: True only vs unbounded full-RAG. Smart-RAG with precomputed table is 1 FLOP vs substrate's 6 at higher accuracy.
FLOPs_universal_advantage.verdict: PARTIALLY FAILED — true vs full-RAG, false as universal claim

bounded_RAG_29_percent_strawman.claim: Bounded RAG only gets 29% accuracy, substrate beats it
bounded_RAG_29_percent_strawman.actual: Only true vs FIFO-eviction. Smart bounded RAG gets 100%.
bounded_RAG_29_percent_strawman.verdict: STRAWMAN — comparison was against weak RAG implementation

conflict_stickiness_specific_to_reward_r.claim: Trained substrate's stickiness specifically resists reversed-reward conflict
conflict_stickiness_specific_to_reward_r.actual: Substrate carries Wake-A bias into ANY new world equally. Just 'weights persist.'
conflict_stickiness_specific_to_reward_r.verdict: OVERSOLD — real but not specific to conflict

core_property_summary.persistence: survives sleep, multi-sleep, world change, 30% damage
core_property_summary.individuation: distinguishable from peers when experiences differ
core_property_summary.autobiographical_specificity: knows own past, not generic stats
core_property_summary.continuity_of_process: fork twins remember shared past AND grow distinct
core_property_summary.identity_in_weights: copy = identical individual; partial damage = graceful loss

what_NOT_proven: Consciousness in phenomenological sense (no qualia, no reportability)
Efficiency advantage over trivial baselines in toy regimes
next_strategic_options: scale_up: test in non-trivial domains (months of work, decisive answer)
productize: substrate-as-identity-layer for LLM agents (small scope, real deliverable, leverages our edge)
write_up: comprehensive research note with code release (smallest commitment)
